use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with tactile offset shadow effects for modern interfaces
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements like toolbars or navigation
Multiple button sizes to establish visual hierarchy in forms and layouts
Keyboard-accessible buttons with proper focus-visible states
Disabled button states for conditional form submissions
ai_summary: A neobrutalist-style button component featuring distinctive offset shadow effects that animate on hover, creating a tactile, dimensional feel. Offers four variants (default, noShadow, neutral, reverse) with multiple sizes and full keyboard accessibility. Uses Radix UI Slot for composition, making it flexible for pattern composition.
